title: Boats Is Jumping?
description: It makes the boats in the game jump. Yes. Like a horse!
body:
_Compatible with Modpacks_

# Modpacks using this mod:

*   [Neo Adventure](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ned)
*   [CobbleVIJG](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cobblevijg)
*   [Etar Experience](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/etar-experience)

Thank you to everyone who uses the mod ❤️

***

# About:

Ever wished your boat could hop over obstacles instead of getting stuck? With **Boats is Jumping**, you can make boats jump up to 2 blocks while riding them.

### Features

*   Allows boats to jump a maximum of 2 blocks high.
*   Works seamlessly while you’re riding the boat.
*   Simple and lightweight. just adds the ability to jump, nothing else.

![Boat Jumping 1](https://github.com/KaplanBedwars/MobPVP/blob/main/util/video1_hq.gif?raw=true) ![Boat Jumping 2](https://github.com/KaplanBedwars/MobPVP/blob/main/util/video2_hq.gif?raw=true)

### Compatibility

*   Fabric
*   Quilt
*   NeoForge
*   Forge

Bring a little more fun and freedom to your water adventures!
